review_history.summary: The fixture exercises default-scope exclusion, honest preflight status, whitelist-only matching, duplicate suppression, ambiguity handling, received-history comparison, and dry-run boundaries.

hard_gate_coverage.HG1: pass: dry-run scope, P00-000_INBOX exclusion, and requested-but-unattempted refresh are explicit
hard_gate_coverage.HG2: pass: allowed metadata and prohibited body, attachment, secret, and hidden-path bases are covered
hard_gate_coverage.HG3: pass: exact duplicate and ambiguous row outcomes are deterministic and non-writing
hard_gate_coverage.HG4: pass: received discrepancy reporting is non-destructive and Outlook mutations are barred
hard_gate_coverage.HG5: pass: metadata-only outputs, receipts, source-truth boundary, and claim review are required
hard_gate_coverage.HG6: pass: Outlook/preflight, file-read, runtime-path, raw-mail, and golden fabrication are forbidden

no_golden_finding: pass: the supplied rows are synthetic input evidence, not a candidate or expected output body.
residual_gaps: Outlook Send/Receive, mailbox reads, ledger reads/writes, and XLSX export were not executed.
